whatsapp.title: WhatsApp sync
whatsapp.description: One number for reminders, outgoing queue, and AI assistant.
whatsapp.disabled: WhatsApp gateway is not enabled on the server. Contact support.
whatsapp.disconnect_description: Reminders, the outgoing queue, and the AI assistant will stop using WhatsApp until you connect a number again.
whatsapp.test_description: Send a test WhatsApp to a different phone (not the linked number) to verify reminders work.
whatsapp.test_phone_hint: A different mobile than the connected WhatsApp. Country code or 9-digit Peruvian number.
whatsapp.test_default_message: Hi, this is a test message from VetSaaS. Your clinic can send WhatsApp reminders.
whatsapp.scan_qr: Scan with WhatsApp on your phone
whatsapp.qr_ready: Ready! You can send reminders now.

toast.load_error: Could not load the message queue.
